heading: Ships’ stores: sale of goods and services

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Under such regulations and at such prices as the Secretary of the Navy may prescribe, the Secretary may provide for the sale of goods and services from ships’ stores to members of the naval service and to such other persons as provided by law.

children.heading: .—Incidental Services
children.label: b .—Incidental Services
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may provide financial services, space, utilities, and labor to ships’ stores on a nonreimbursable basis.
Uniform items, emblematic and athletic clothing, and equipment.
Beverages and related food and snacks.
